examples: Some in the industry apparently do not want to pay for CFC substitutes, which can run five times the cost of CFC's.
In fact, the United States Customs Service reports that CFC-12 is a contraband problem second only to illicit drugs.
Tinkering with transfer-pricing rules or CFC rules will not solve the problem.
Most companies that make the inhalers have retooled, reinvested, and come up with new products that are CFC-free.
